meaning: adv.明亮地,显然地,易觉察地
examples: All the work is transparently done in the kernel space.
All this is done transparently for you by the JSSE runtime.
This is performed transparently to the user or application.
The American charity operates transparently, publishing, for instance, details of every grant it makes.
The problem most people have with this decision was that it was so transparently unfair.
